501(c)(3) Public Disclosures

Public Disclosures

E5 Enclave Incorporated makes all required documents available per IRS regulations.

Required Documents

Available for public inspection per IRS regulations.

Form 990 — Annual Return

Annual information return filed with the IRS. Available within 30 days of request if not posted online. Search on IRS →

Filed annually

IRS Determination Letter

Letter from the IRS recognizing E5 Enclave Incorporated as a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization. EIN 99-3822441. Verify on IRS →

Issued June 2024

Articles of Incorporation

Founding document filed with the State of Florida. Establishes E5 Enclave Incorporated as a nonprofit corporation.

Available on request

Bylaws

Governing bylaws of E5 Enclave Incorporated. Defines board structure, officer roles, meeting procedures, and amendment processes.

Available on request

Conflict of Interest Policy

Policy governing board member conflicts of interest. Required for 501(c)(3) organizations. Ensures decisions are made in the organization's best interest.

Available on request

How to Request Documents

Under IRS regulations, E5 must make the above documents available for public inspection upon request. Contact us at accounts@e5enclave.com. We respond within 30 days.

SAM.gov Registration

E5 Enclave Incorporated is registered in the System for Award Management (SAM.gov). UEI: H8NGXEYE2HH8. CAGE: 07E888. Verify on SAM.gov →

E5 Enclave

Sovereign institutional infrastructure.
Founded 2024. Liberty City, Miami.
